entry.data:
MOSTLY SUNNY
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS THIS AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 20 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS, MAINLY IN THE MORNING
COOLER
LESS HUMID WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE MID 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, DIMINISHING TO AROUND 5 MPH AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
WEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS AROUND 80

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
